metadata.description: The builder/operator toolchain — Claude Code plugins for authoring & red-teaming plugins, running latticed agentic workflows, and operating agentic systems and the repos they live in. Self-contained worked examples of the five-primitive model, each authored and red-teamed with plugins-factory. The brand/product plugins live in the sibling nonoun-plugins marketplace; the self-hosting dark factory built on these is the nested dev-factory marketplace.

plugins.name: plugins-factory
plugins.description: Run the Claude Code plugin lifecycle against one 9-dimension architecture standard — component fit, boundary cohesion, dependency legality — judged by a 9-critic council that runs as parallel isolated agents. Build with /plugin-author·carve·edit; judge with /plugin-score·critique·promote. Bundles an advisory hook that validates plugin.json/marketplace.json on save (never blocks).

plugins.name: harness-forge
plugins.description: Hydrate a project to run looping, latticed agentic workflows: a kernel that scaffolds and operates a typed knowledge lattice (9 layers × 5 scopes × a maturity machine), plus a bounded autonomous loop whose caps are enforced in code by a consent-wired stop-gate — not by the agent's counting. Ships an operating agent roster, a 7-critic structural council, stdlib lattice machinery, a consent-gated wiring installer, a /harness-status dashboard, and a read-only lattice-query MCP.

plugins.name: agent-ops
plugins.description: Author, operate, and review full-spectrum agentic systems and the repos they live in — agent loops & teams, the control plane, harness & context engineering, agentic-workflow UX, and repo memory/docs + architecture review — with a named-practitioner council, verifiable gates (loop blueprints, audit ledgers), and a repo-memory MCP for per-instance retrieval over a repo's agent docs + audit ledger.

plugins.name: app-factory
plugins.description: Cultivate a project as prose — idea → PRD → SPEC → tickets → QA — and compile it into software with a bounded `/app-goal` + `/app-loop`. A prose front door over a self-testing verification spine: a coding agent never grades its own work (the signal is a real verifier's exit status, not the worker's opinion) nor authors the bar it is graded against (acceptance is independently derived from the spec, entailment-checked, human-sealed). The simplicity is the operator surface; the rigor is vendored from harness-forge + dev-kernel. Self-contained.
